title: The Sugar Found Floating in Space

scenes.text: Scientists have discovered sugar molecules in the vastness of interstellar space.
This discovery marks the first time sugar has been identified outside our Solar System.
These sugar molecules could give insights into the building blocks of life in the universe.
Could this be key to understanding life's origins in the cosmos?
scenes.label: KEY TO LIFE?
scenes.sub: Are we alone in the universe?

scenes.text: Follow if curiosity runs your brain.

description: Sugar has been found in interstellar space, potentially illuminating the secrets of how life began. Follow for daily science!
